# Summary

Current Codex docs for repo and user instruction files.

# Key facts

- Codex checks `AGENTS.override.md` and `AGENTS.md` in each directory from the project root down to the current working directory.
- User-scope instruction files live at `~/.codex/AGENTS.md` and `~/.codex/AGENTS.override.md`.
- `project_doc_fallback_filenames` in `~/.codex/config.toml` extends the filename list beyond the default AGENTS names.

# Refresh notes

- No public markdown source was found during this pilot; this cache is a normalized summary of the rendered docs page.
